# TSMO Watch

> AI-powered art protection platform. Monitors the web 24/7 for stolen artwork, proves ownership with C2PA-signed timestamp proofs, and helps creators take action against copyright infringement and AI training misuse.

TSMO Watch protects creators by combining reverse-image monitoring across the web and social media, AI training opt-out signals, DCT pixel watermarking, and C2PA v2.2 manifest signing. Every protected asset gets a tamper-evident timestamp proof and a downloadable evidence trail for DMCA takedowns.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What TSMO Watch does and how it protects your art.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription plans and the $0.49 pay-as-you-go single proof tier.
- [Upload & Protect](/upload): Upload artwork to add watermarking, metadata, and a C2PA timestamp proof.
- [Monitoring Hub](/monitoring-hub): Web, social, marketplace, deepfake, and trademark monitoring.
- [Protection Hub](/protection-hub): AI training protection, screenshot shield, and watermark settings.
- [DMCA Center](/dmca-center): Generate DMCA takedown notices and track responses.
- [Threat Alerts](/threat-alerts): Real-time match findings from active scans.
- [Accuracy Dashboard](/accuracy-dashboard): Live detection performance from real scan results.
- [About](/about-tsmo): Mission, founder story, and the meaning behind TSMO.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about protection, pricing, and how the platform works.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the TSMO team at support@tsmowatch.com.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on art protection, AI training, DMCA, and copyright.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Real outcomes from creators using TSMO.
- [Stop Art Theft](/stop-art-theft): Guide to detecting and stopping online art theft.
- [Protect Photos](/protect-photos): Photo-specific protection workflow.
- [Protection Guide](/protection-guide): Step-by-step protection setup.
- [Press Kit](/press-kit): Logos, brand assets, and media resources.

- [Get the App](/get-app): Mobile and desktop install options.
